meta.summary: PLINK 2.0 alpha 7.1 command-line runtime for large-scale genotype data management, statistics, GWAS, PGEN workflows, and VCF sample subsetting.
meta.description: PLINK 2.0 alpha 7.1 command-line runtime for large-scale genotype data management, statistics, GWAS, PGEN workflows, and VCF sample subsetting.

test: grep -Fx "PLINK 2.0 2.0.0-a.7.1" /opt/plink2/share/doc/plink2/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F "19344fa5ed9fac92241c23d5e2b5f73059c8880f8216b590187b7ea5caf79551" /opt/plink2/share/doc/plink2/source.txt >/dev/null && test -s /opt/plink2/share/licenses/plink2/COPYING && test -s /opt/plink2/share/licenses/plink2/COPYING.LESSER && test -s /opt/plink2/share/licenses/plink2/simde-COPYING && test -s /opt/plink2/share/licenses/plink2/libdeflate-COPYING && test -s /opt/plink2/share/licenses/plink2/zstd-COPYING

plink2 --version 2>&1 | grep -F "PLINK v2.0.0-a.7.1" >/dev/null && plink2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- "--make-pgen" >/dev/null && plink2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- "--glm" >/dev/null && vcf_subset --version 2>&1 | grep -F "vcf_subset v1.0.4" >/dev/null && vcf_subset --help 2>&1 | grep -F "Usage: vcf_subset" >/dev/null

ldd "$(command -v plink2)" > /tmp/taf-plink2-ldd.txt && grep -F "libopenblas" /tmp/taf-plink2-ldd.txt >/dev/null && grep -F "liblapack" /tmp/taf-plink2-ldd.txt >/dev/null && grep -F "libz.so" /tmp/taf-plink2-ldd.txt >/dev/null && if grep -F "not found" /tmp/taf-plink2-ldd.txt; then exit 1; fi && ldd "$(command -v vcf_subset)" > /tmp/taf-plink2-vcf-subset-ldd.txt && grep -F "libz.so" /tmp/taf-plink2-vcf-subset-ldd.txt >/dev/null && if grep -F "not found" /tmp/taf-plink2-vcf-subset-ldd.txt; then exit 1; fi

tmp=/tmp/taf-plink2-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; plink2 --dummy 8 12 --make-pgen --out tiny > dummy.log 2>&1; test -s tiny.pgen && test -s tiny.psam && test -s tiny.pvar; plink2 --pfile tiny --freq --out freq > freq.log 2>&1; test -s freq.afreq; grep -F "#CHROM" freq.afreq >/dev/null; plink2 --pfile tiny --hardy --out hardy > hardy.log 2>&1; test -s hardy.hardy; grep -F "#CHROM" hardy.hardy >/dev/null; plink2 --pfile tiny --export vcf --out exported > export.log 2>&1; test -s exported.vcf; grep -F "#CHROM" exported.vcf >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-plink2-vcf-subset-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '%s\n' '##fileformat=VCFv4.2' '##contig=<ID=chr1,length=1000>' '##FORMAT=<ID=GT,Number=1,Type=String,Description="Genotype">' '#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	s1	s2' 'chr1	10	rs1	A	G	50	PASS	.	GT	0/0	0/1' 'chr1	20	rs2	C	T	60	PASS	.	GT	0/1	1/1' > tiny.vcf; vcf_subset --in tiny.vcf --out keep.vcf --indv s2 > vcf_subset.log 2>&1; test -s keep.vcf; grep "^#CHROM" keep.vcf | grep -F "s2" >/dev/null; if grep "^#CHROM" keep.vcf | grep -F "s1"; then exit 1; fi; grep -F "rs1" keep.vcf >/dev/null; gzip -c tiny.vcf > tiny.vcf.gz; vcf_subset --in tiny.vcf.gz --out no_samples.vcf --no-samples > no_samples.log 2>&1; test -s no_samples.vcf; grep -F "#CHROM" no_samples.vcf >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: PLINK 2.0
upstream.license: GPL-3.0-or-later for the PLINK 2.0 main application; LGPL-3.0-or-later for include libraries and vcf_subset; bundled SIMDe/libdeflate/zstd components retain their upstream licenses
upstream.citation: Chang CC, Chow CC, Tellier LCAM, Vattikuti S, Purcell SM, Lee JJ. Second-generation PLINK: rising to the challenge of larger and richer datasets. GigaScience. 2015;4:7.
